records.question: Which stadium named Stark's Park is located at Raith Rovers and has a capacity of at least 10104, a lowest attendance exactly 1294, an average attendance of at least 2106, and a highest attendance of at most 4812?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.stadium_id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.name = 'Stark''s Park' AND stadium.highest <= 4812 AND stadium.average >= 2106 AND stadium.lowest = 1294 AND stadium.capacity >= 10104 AND stadium.location = 'Raith Rovers'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Stadium_ID FROM stadium WHERE Name = 'Stark''s Park' AND Location = 'Raith Rovers' AND Capacity >= 10104 AND Lowest = 1294 AND Average >= 2106 AND Highest <= 4812

records.question: Which stadium called Glebe Park in Brechin City holds exactly 3960 people, has an average attendance of at most 552, a lowest attendance of exactly 315, and a highest attendance of at least 780?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.stadium_id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average <= 552 AND stadium.capacity = 3960 AND stadium.location = 'Brechin City' AND stadium.name = 'Glebe Park' AND stadium.lowest = 315 AND stadium.highest >= 780
records.pred_sql: SELECT Stadium_ID FROM stadium WHERE Name = 'Glebe Park' AND Location = 'Brechin City' AND Capacity = 3960 AND Average <= 552 AND Lowest = 315 AND Highest >= 780

records.question: Which stadium named Gayfield Park in Arbroath has an average of exactly 638, a capacity of at least 4125, a highest value at most 921, and a lowest value no more than 411?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.stadium_id FROM stadium
WHERE stadium.average = 638 AND stadium.highest <= 921 AND stadium.location = 'Arbroath' AND stadium.name = 'Gayfield Park' AND stadium.capacity >= 4125 AND stadium.lowest <= 411
records.pred_sql: SELECT Stadium_ID FROM stadium WHERE Name = 'Gayfield Park' AND Location = 'Arbroath' AND Average = 638 AND Capacity >= 4125 AND Highest <= 921 AND Lowest <= 411
